clips.title: The Stranger
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, noir grade. A foggy cobblestone alley at night, a single gas lamp, mist swirling. A hooded person stands half in shadow, mysterious and still, face partly hidden, a knowing tilt of the head. A person in a long hooded coat. Cool lamp glow, thick fog, mysterious mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Map
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, intriguing grade. A dim study at night, an old cryptic map spread on a desk, a single candle. A person studies the map with a mysterious, secretive intensity, tracing a line, half-smiling. A person in a waistcoat. Warm candlelight, deep shadow, mysterious mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Mask
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, elegant grade. A dim opulent masquerade ball, candlelight and gold. A person wears an ornate masquerade mask, eyes glinting mysteriously behind it, an enigmatic gaze. A person in formal evening attire and a decorative mask. Warm candlelight, rich shadow, mysterious mood, 85mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Vanishing
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, atmospheric grade. A misty empty street at dawn, thick fog rolling. A person walks away into the fog, mysteriously half-dissolved by the mist, silhouette fading. A person in a long coat. Cool pale light, dense fog, mysterious mood, 35mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Key
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, intriguing grade. A dim corridor before an old ornate locked door. A person holds up an antique ornate key with a mysterious, secretive expression, about to unlock a secret. A person in a dark coat. Warm dim light, deep shadow, mysterious mood, 85mm. Shallow depth of field, subtle grain, 24fps.

clips.title: The Archive
clips.prompt: Live-action photoreal, present day, moody grade. A shadowy old library at night, towering shelves, a shaft of moonlight. A person slides a hidden book from the shelf with a mysterious, conspiratorial look, glancing over their shoulder. A person in scholarly attire. Cool moonlight, deep shadow, mysterious mood, 50mm. Shallow depth of field, grain, 24fps.
